case_title: MARTIN ALLEN EDELSON VS. GINALORIE C DIONIDA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2024 - CONTINUED TO MAR-01-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 611 - NO JPT IN 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2024 BY CURTIS KARNOW. PLAINTIFF MARTIN EDELSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GINALORIE C. DIONIDA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (611)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2024 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVIVCE FEE FOUND. SERVED JAN-16-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIONIDA, GINALORIE C
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY EDELSON, MARTIN ALLEN AS TO DEFENDANT DIONIDA, GINALORIE C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDELSON, MARTIN ALLEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDELSON, MARTIN ALLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIONIDA, GINALORIE C $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00, BLANKET TO BE RETURNED TO PLAINITFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
